::: matrix-bg
---
title: "About Me"
---

You can download my CV by clicking [here.](CurriculumVitae11032026.pdf)

# Huseyin Emre Bacak

📍 Ankara, Turkiye\
📱 +90 532 746 08 40 \| ✉️ [hemrebacak18\@gmail.com](mailto:hemrebacak18@gmail.com) \| 🔗 [linkedin.com/in/hemre-bacak](https://www.linkedin.com/in/hemre-bacak/)

![](vesikalik.jpg){fig-align="center" width="150" style="border-radius: 50%;"}

## Summary

As a dynamic and insightful person with hands-on experience in data-driven decision-making, I excel in bridging the gap between technical solutions and business strategies. I bring a unique blend of academic rigor from Bogazici University and practical business intelligence, optimally balanced to contribute effectively in a fast-paced and challenging environment.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Experience

### ROKETSAN A.S. — Digital Supply Chain System Development Engineer

*Aug. 2024 - Present \| Ankara, Turkiye*

-   Serving as an interface between user departments and internal/external IT teams to provide technical infrastructure for supply chain digitalization projects.
-   Coordinating functional and technical requirements for software developments (production planning, QM, logistics, procurement) and assuming Product Owner responsibilities when required.
-   Managing test scenarios and execution processes, including functional, integration, and User Acceptance Testing (UAT).
-   Transforming supply chain data into interactive dashboards and reporting metrics using BI tools for senior management executive summaries.

### B/S/H/ Home Appliances Group — Business Analyst Intern

*Sept. 2023 – Jun. 2024 \| Istanbul, Turkiye*

-   Designed and implemented internal applications for CRM, performance monitoring, and database management.
-   Collaborated with the team to ensure application functionality through rigorous testing and maintenance.
-   Fostered innovation by designing new features to enhance the competitive edge in the market.

### Intertech IT and Marketing Inc. — Business Analyst Intern

*Jul. 2023 – Sept. 2023 \| Istanbul, Turkiye*

-   Worked on the implementation of an "AI-powered Digital On-Boarding process" for mobile banking apps.
-   Created Project Canvas, User Stories, and Activity Diagrams; provided UI/UX design input.
-   Created datasets to train/test AI models and optimized team workflows using Agile & Scrum methodologies.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Education

### Bogazici University

**B.S. in Industrial Engineering** \| *Aug. 2021 – Jun. 2024 \| Istanbul, Turkiye* *GPA: 3.46/4.00*

-   *Previous Major:* Computer Engineering (Aug. 2018 - Aug. 2021). Completed Prep School with Grade A. Switched majors in 2021.

### Cankiri TOBB Science High School

*Sept. 2014 – Jun. 2018 \| Cankiri, Turkiye* *GPA: 97.63/100*

-   Valedictorian (Most successful student).
-   Ranked 128th in National University Placement Exams (YKS-2018) among 2M+ students.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Skills

-   **Programming & Data:** Python (Optimization, ML, Statistics), R (Data Management & Statistics), MS Excel (VBA, Macros, Python Integration), SQL (MySQL, T-SQL).
-   **BI & Tools:** Tableau, Apache Superset, Power BI, Figma.
-   **Languages:** Turkish (Native), English (Fluent, BUEPT Grade A).

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Projects

### Measuring Effects of Free Shipping on Sales and Price (Graduation Project)

-   Collaborated to optimize the threshold value for contingent free shipping in e-commerce using effect formulation and simulation.
-   Developed a model using extensive data analysis and ML algorithms that increased revenue by 5.36%.
-   Provided actionable insights for revenue maximization in competitive online markets.
:::
